title: AlanHT's Ui Pack
description: Give it a try with the comfortable UI.
body:
# AlanHT's Ui Pack

**A custom UI resource pack for SIRIUS Ui Mod.**

This pack replaces the title screen layout and modifies some button textures.  
Currently, no other screens or features are included.

## Requirements
- Minecraft Java Edition (1.21.1 & 26.1.x)
- Required [SIRIUS Ui](https://modrinth.com/mod/alan-unified-ui)

## What's Changed
- Redesigned the **Title Screen** with four large centered buttons.
- Introduced custom button textures and template.
- Background changed to a static image.

This is the current [Background Video](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1kZY5z1E2N?spm_id_from=333.788.videopod.sections).

> More screens (pause, death, etc.) will be added in future updates.
